# Dr. Ahmad Al Badawi

> Senior Scientist in cryptography. Research on fully homomorphic encryption (FHE), privacy-preserving machine learning, and lattice cryptography. Core maintainer of OpenFHE.

## About

Ahmad Al Badawi, Ph.D. is a Senior Scientist working at the intersection of applied cryptography and machine learning. His research advances fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) toward practical, deployable systems for private AI inference.

Selected expertise: fully homomorphic encryption (BFV, BGV, CKKS, TFHE schemes), privacy-preserving machine learning, lattice cryptography, hardware acceleration (GPU and ASIC), post-quantum cryptography.

Affiliations: Ph.D. from the National University of Singapore (2018). Co-Principal Investigator and Technical Lead on the DARPA DPRIVE program (TREBUCHET team).

## Key pages

- [Research](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/research/): research themes, current projects, grants
- [Research Statement](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/research/statement/): long-form research agenda and the case for private-by-default computation
- [Publications](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/publications/): peer-reviewed publications and patents
- [Talks](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/talks/): conference talks and invited lectures
- [Teaching](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/teaching/): courses and academic instruction
- [Service](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/service/): program committees and community contributions
- [Code](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/code/): open-source projects including OpenFHE
- [Blog](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/posts/): technical writing on FHE and cryptographic engineering
- [About](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/about/): hub linking to background, experience, honors, service, teaching, and code
- [Contact](https://ahmadalbadawi.com/contact/): how to get in touch

## Recent work

- 2026: SoK: Private LLM Inference using Approximate Homomorphic Encryption (https://eprint.iacr.org/2026/935)
- 2026: Application-Aware Approximate Homomorphic Encryption (IACR Communications in Cryptology)
- 2025: FHERMA Cookbook: FHE Components for Privacy-Preserving Applications (WAHC)
- 2025: Encrypt What Matters: Selective Model Encryption for Secure Federated Learning (IFIP DBSec)
- Ongoing: Privacy-Preserving LLM Inference under FHE
